title: Aurora Audio
description: Reference headphone brand rendered as a living sound-field: 12,000 particles bent by a generative Web Audio synth you conduct.

title: Terra Atelier
description: Scroll to throw a pot: one lathe-morphed vessel travels from raw lump to glazed celadon across six stages of the wheel.

title: Nova Orbit
description: Fly a full launch profile with the scrollbar: ignition, max-Q shake, the Kármán line fade to vacuum, and a procedural Earth rising into frame.

title: CIPHER
description: The whole site is a working terminal: navigate a red-team consultancy by typing commands, running a fake recon sweep, and reading redacted casework.

title: Flora Lab
description: Plant seeds in a living canvas garden — procedural stems grow, branch, and bloom into five perfume botanicals while your accord recipe composes itself.

title: Meridian
description: A mechanical watch built from primitives that lifts apart layer by layer as you scroll — crystal to caseback — while its blued-steel hands keep real time.

title: PULSE
description: An interval-training round you can grab: drag the 60-second dial to scrub WORK and REST phases while the whole page — marquees, BPM, giant type — keeps tempo.

title: Glacier
description: A living body of water raymarched in a raw-WebGL fragment shader — metaballs with refraction, dispersion, and caustics that your cursor stirs and joins.

title: Noctua Observatory
description: Drag a wrapping night sky with inertia — seven invented constellations draw themselves in as you drift near, each with its own folklore card.

title: Ember
description: A menu you read by firelight: a particle hearth fire lights the whole page, dims as it burns down, and must be stoked to keep the bread legible.

title: Vertex
description: Three unbuilt projects draft themselves line by line on a living blueprint sheet — orbit the wireframe while annotations, dimensions, and redlines catch up.

title: LIGATURE
description: A specimen you conduct: pointer X bends weight, Y bends optical size, the wheel softens terminals, and a glyph waterfall ripples in your wake.

title: BATHYAL
description: One continuous dive from surf to seafloor: the scrollbar is a winch, sunlight dies on schedule, and procedurally drawn animals glow at their true depths.

title: SUMINAGA
description: The menu is marbled, not printed: mathematically exact suminagashi where taps drop ink, drags comb it, and each tea re-inks the stylus.

title: VECTOR DRIFT
description: The studio site is the demo cabinet: a complete pseudo-3D neon lane runner with attract mode, WebAudio bleeps, and a best score that survives you.

title: ORRERY
description: A quant fund as celestial mechanics: 40,000 instruments orbit in shader-integrated shells while a volatility dial degrades clockwork into storm.

title: MAISON VELA
description: The whole house is one length of simulated silk: 2,300 Verlet particles under gravity and breath, stirred by your hand, re-dyed for the season.

title: KOPPAR
description: Roast the batch yourself: hold for heat, watch 140 beans darken through the true color stages, catch first crack on the live profile curve — or make charcoal.

title: VOLTAIC
description: A motorcycle assembled from sixty raw primitives — no models loaded — idling on a lit plinth with live paint, ride modes, and Sport-mode light streaks.

title: HALFTONE
description: The catalogue is a working turntable: four records, each a generative WebAudio loop, with a draggable platter that bends tempo and pitch like the real thing.

title: PETRICHOR
description: One fragment shader as an entire sky: scrub the hour from dawn to starfield, raise a storm with a slider, and wait for the lightning it earns.

title: GRAMMAGE
description: One sheet folds itself into a paper plane as you scroll — a real hinge-and-membership fold engine, crease by crease — then flies off the bench trailing a dashed line.

title: UMBRA
description: A conching vat of molten chocolate in a domain-warped shader — stir it in slow, steady circles and the temper meter grows Form-V crystals until the gloss snaps in.

title: PENDULA
description: A four-arm damped harmonograph drawing live in accumulating ink, with its pendulum bobs visible at the table's edge — strike it and no two études repeat.

title: SOMNE
description: A sleeper train window from the 22:04 departure to the coast at dawn: the scrollbar is the timetable, so the train genuinely brakes into every station on the line.
